## Type

- [ ] New mod
- [ ] Mod update
- [ ] Mod removal
- [ ] Config change
- [ ] MC / loader version bump
- [ ] CI / docs only

## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `packwiz refresh` and committed the result
- [ ] Booted the pack locally (if mod or config change)
- [ ] No world-incompatible changes, OR called out below
- [ ] Bumped `version` in `pack.toml` if this is a release
